id.description: The ID of the Enrollment as an integer.

user_email.description: The email of the User owning the Enrollment.

user_name.description: The full name of the User owning the Enrollment.

user_id.description: The ID of the User owning the Enrollment as an integer.

course_id.description: The ID of the Course as an integer.

percentage_completed.description: The percentage complete of the Enrollment. A number between 0.0 and 1.0. For example, to represent a percentage complete of 75%, this value would be 0.75.

expired.description: A boolean indicating whether the Enrollment is expired.

is_free_trial.description: A boolean indicating whether the Enrollment is a free trial.

completed.description: A boolean indicating whether the Enrollment is complete.

started_at.description: The date/time that the Enrollment started.

activated_at.description: The date/time that the Enrollment was activated.

completed_at.description: The date/time that the Enrollment was completed.

updated_at.description: The date/time that the Enrollment was updated last.

expiry_date.description: The date/time that the Enrollment expires.
